author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #25 - Showroom! is confirmed. Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel   

This week the topic is the Showroom! What are you expecting to see? What would you like to be included in the future of this product?   
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1006782282645897266
